title: pelargonium × sceleratum
intro: Pelargonium × sceleratum, also known as the South African pelargonium or Cape pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and rosmarinic acid, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × sceleratum include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
